principles: Every handoff uses a registered source, target, packet type, and required payload contract.
Every packet carries provenance and a SHA-256 integrity receipt.
Remote delivery is never inferred from packet creation, export, queueing, or linkback registration.
External platforms return explicit acceptance, completion, rejection, or failure receipts.
Retries are bounded, human-confirmed, and never automatic in the file-backed mode.
Public APIs expose route methodology only; payloads and operational history remain private.
title: Typed Cross-Platform Intelligence Workflows
